subcodes.first_line: O Sage! The manifestations of self and desire have encompassed the world. Each day from the clouds of the oppressors' glory [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حکیم شوٴنات نفس و هوی عالم را احاطه نموده هر یوم از سحاب جاه ظالمین
subcodes.subjects: @contention and conflict, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @exhortations and counsels, @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual transformation, @holy war [jihad]; violence in the name of God, @unity in diversity
